title: Diner in the Storm
description: Diner in the Storm is a thrilling escape game where you take shelter in a diner from a sudden storm. You are safe for now, but its not long before you realize theres something dangerous outside the thin diner walls. Leaving is easy, but convincing everyone else to come with you might not be.
instructions: Left mouse button to interact Optional AD left right arrow keys to move left and right Space to continue dialog
